name: academorix/messaging
purpose: Direct messaging — Conversation + ConversationParticipant + Message aggregates for user-to-user threaded chat inside the tenant.
when_to_use: Users need to exchange direct or group messages inside a tenant with per-thread participant lists.
when_not_to_use: For transactional notifications, use academorix/notifications. For broadcast announcements, use academorix/announcements.
